# core-v1_store_app_summary (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `app_id` (String) Application ID of the application summary to be returned

### Optional

- `installed` (Boolean) When true, only return the summary for the specified application if the application is installed
- `prioritize_installed_info` (Boolean) If present and true, and the application is installed, the application information will be derived from the installed application version.
- `upgradable` (Boolean) When true, only return the summary for the specified application if the application is upgradable

### Read-Only

- `catalogs` (List of String) Catalogs where this app was found
- `categories` (List of String) Application categories.
- `description` (String) Application description that can be used for user display purposes
- `has_settings` (Boolean) Application has settings
- `info_version` (Attributes) The information about an application version available from a catalog.
At least one of "semVer" or "commitHash" must/will be defined. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--info_version))
- `info_version_metadata` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--info_version_metadata))
- `installed_version` (Attributes) The information about an application version available from a catalog.
At least one of "semVer" or "commitHash" must/will be defined. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--installed_version))
- `installed_version_metadata` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--installed_version_metadata))
- `latest_version` (Attributes) The information about an application version available from a catalog.
At least one of "semVer" or "commitHash" must/will be defined. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--latest_version))
- `latest_version_metadata` (Attributes) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--latest_version_metadata))
- `supported_endpoints` (List of String) Application supported endpoints.
- `title` (String) Application title that can be used for user display purposes
- `vendor` (String) Name of the vendor for this app

<a id="nestedatt--info_version"></a>
### Nested Schema for `info_version`

Read-Only:

- `app_id` (String) The identifier for the application
- `catalog` (String) The catalog in which this application version was found
- `commit_hash` (String) The commit hash for the application version.
- `sem_ver` (String) The semantic version for the application version.


<a id="nestedatt--info_version_metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `info_version_metadata`

Read-Only:

- `published_time` (String) The date and time when the application version was published.


<a id="nestedatt--installed_version"></a>
### Nested Schema for `installed_version`

Read-Only:

- `app_id` (String) The identifier for the application
- `catalog` (String) The catalog in which this application version was found
- `commit_hash` (String) The commit hash for the application version.
- `sem_ver` (String) The semantic version for the application version.


<a id="nestedatt--installed_version_metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `installed_version_metadata`

Read-Only:

- `published_time` (String) The date and time when the application version was published.

### Nested Schema for `latest_version`

Read-Only:

- `app_id` (String) The identifier for the application
- `catalog` (String) The catalog in which this application version was found
- `commit_hash` (String) The commit hash for the application version.
- `sem_ver` (String) The semantic version for the application version.
